zh.Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可傑爾姆斯福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isaac Learned I於1623年2月25日出生在英國素瑞貝爾蒙時，他的父親William Learned33歲，母親Goodith Gillman38歲。他於1646年7月9日與Mary Stearns在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1657年11月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可傑爾姆斯福德享年34歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可傑爾姆斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isaac Learned I于1623年2月25日出生在英国素瑞貝爾蒙时，他的父亲William Learned33岁，母亲Goodith Gillman38岁。他于1646年7月9日与Mary Stearns在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1657年11月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可傑爾姆斯福德享年34岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可傑爾姆斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: Learned
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of English   Leonard  . An intermediate stage in this change is   Learnard  . Compare   Larned  .

History: William Learned was admitted to the First Church in Charlestown, MA, in 1632, and in 1640 was one of the first settlers of Woburn, MA. One of his better known descendants, Ebenezer, a revolutionary war officer, was born at Oxford, MA, in 1728.

variants.name: Leonard
meanings: English; French (Léonard); Walloon (mainly Léonard): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements leo ‘lion’ (a late addition to the vocabulary of ancient Germanic name elements, taken from Latin) + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, which was taken to England by the Normans. A Christian saint of this name, who is supposed to have lived in the 6th century, but about whom nothing is known except for a largely fictional life dating from half a millennium later, was popular throughout Europe in the early Middle Ages and was regarded as the patron of peasants and horses. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Leonardo , Polish, Slovenian, etc. Lenart or Lenard , and probably also their derivatives. Compare Larned , Learned , and Yenor .
Irish (Fermanagh): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Mac Giolla Fhionáin or of Langan .
German: variant of   Leonhard  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Larned
meanings: Variant of   Learned  , itself an altered form of English   Leonard  .

nameMeanings.name: Isaac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the son of Abraham, who was nearly sacrificed by his father according to a command of God which was changed at the last moment. A ram, caught in a nearby thicket, was sacrificed instead (Genesis 22:1–13). Isaac lived on to marry Rebecca and become the father of Esau and Jacob. The derivation of the name is not certain; it has traditionally been connected with the Hebrew verb meaning ‘to laugh’. It was borne by both Christians and Jews in the Middle Ages and was taken up by the Puritans in the 16th century.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Isaac Learned I was born on 25 February 1623, in Bermondsey, Surrey, England, his father, William Learned, was 33 and his mother, Goodith Gillman, was 38. He married Mary Stearns on 9 July 1646, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 29 November 1657, in Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 34, and was buried in Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isaac Learned I est né le 25 février 1623, à Bermondsey, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, William Learned, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Goodith Gillman, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Mary Stearns le 9 juillet 1646, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 29 novembre 1657, à Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isaac Learned I am 25. Februar 1623 in Bermondsey, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Learned 33 und seine Mutter Goodith Gillman 38. Er hat am 9. Juli 1646 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mary Stearns geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. November 1657 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isaac Learned I è nato il il 25 febbraio 1623 nel Bermondsey, Surrey, England, il suo padre, William Learned, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Goodith Gillman, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Mary Stearns il 9 luglio 1646, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 novembre 1657, nel Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Isaac Learned Iが1623年2月25日にイギリススリーバーモンドセイで生まれた時，父William Learnedは33歳，母Goodith Gillmanは38歳であった。1646年7月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンでMary Stearnsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1657年11月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスチェルムスフォードで34歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスチェルムスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isaac Learned I(이)가 1623년 2월 25일 영국 수리 버몽시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Learned(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Goodith Gillman(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1646년 7월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 Mary Stearns(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1657년 11월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 헬스퍼드에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 헬스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isaac Learned I nasceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1623, em Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Learned, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Goodith Gillman, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Stearns em 9 de julho de 1646, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de novembro de 1657, em Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isaac Learned I родился 25 февраля 1623 г. в местности бирмондси, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени William Learned было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Goodith Gillman, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Stearns 9 июля 1646 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 29 ноября 1657 г. в местности челмсфорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности челмсфорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isaac Learned I nació el 25 de febrero de 1623, en Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, William Learned, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Goodith Gillman, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Mary Stearns el 9 de julio de 1646, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de noviembre de 1657, en Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
